mechanism_narrative: A 2-standard-deviation rise in industrial production index over the next 5 trading days signals a surge in aggregate demand that boosts S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 5-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 5-day moving average of the S&P 500 return over the past 6 months (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% increase in the unemployment rate over the next 2 months signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and boosts S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day moving average of the S&P 500 return over the past 3 years (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% decline in the housing starts rate over the next 60 trading days signals a supply-side shock that boosts S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 60-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 60-day moving average of the S&P 500 return over the past 5 years (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 50-basis-point increase in the federal funds rate over the next 5 trading days signals a tightening monetary cycle that boosts S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 5-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 5-day moving average of the S&P 500 return over the past 6 months (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-standard-deviation rise in real disposable personal income over the next 20 trading days signals a surge in aggregate demand that boosts S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day moving average of the S&P 500 return over the past 3 years (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.2% decline in the employment rate over the next 60 trading days signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and boosts S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 60-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 60-day moving average of the S&P 500 return over the past 5 years (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-standard-deviation rise in industrial production index and a 1-standard-deviation rise in real disposable personal income over the next 20 trading days signals a surge in aggregate demand that boosts S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day moving average of the S&P 500 return over the past 3 years (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 50-basis-point increase in the federal funds rate and a 10% decline in the housing starts rate over the next 60 trading days signals a tightening monetary cycle and a supply-side shock that boosts S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 60-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 60-day moving average of the S&P 500 return over the past 5 years (t-test p < 0.05).
